Tricyclic Antidepressant (TCA) Screen 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/tricyclic-antidepressant-tca-screen/ 
Tricyclic Antidepressant (TCA) Screen 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a tricyclic antidepressant (TCA) screen? 
This test checks whether tricyclic antidepressants (TCA) can be found in your blood or urine. It can also measure how much TCA is in your blood or urine. TCAs are a type of antidepressant . Antidepressants are prescription medicines that treat depression ,
